moments.title: The Open Championship Recap
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concluded yesterday, July 19th, at Royal Birkdale, with the world's best golfers battling for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Winner's Glory
angles.copy: Relive the drama from Royal Birkdale! The 154th Open Championship crowned its winner yesterday. Who lifted the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Weekend Golf Review
angles.copy: What a weekend of golf! The Open Championship delivered incredible moments. Catch up on all the highlights and biggest talking points.

moments.title: The Hundred Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 men's and women's competitions begin tomorrow, July 21st, with a double-header at the Kia Oval in London.

angles.name: First Match Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready, cricket fans! The Hundred 2026 kicks off tomorrow with MI London vs Sunrisers Leeds. Who are you backing?

angles.name: New Season Buzz
angles.copy: The Hundred is back! The fast-paced cricket tournament starts its sixth season tomorrow. Can MI London defend their title?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Live
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 runs from July 23-26 at Henham Park in Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Latitude Festival opens its gates this Thursday! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Latitude Lineup
angles.copy: Suffolk is getting ready for Latitude! David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi are just some of the big names. Which stage will you be at?

moments.title: Kendal Calling Approaching
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling Festival takes place from July 30 to August 2 at Lowther Deer Park, Cumbria, promising four days of music and arts.

angles.name: Countdown to Kendal
angles.copy: Just 10 days until Kendal Calling! Who's heading to Cumbria for this year's festival fun?

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Tents packed and wellies ready? Kendal Calling is almost here! What's your top tip for surviving a festival weekend?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Top Track
moments.blurb: The current Official UK Singles Chart sees 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean holding the top spot.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: The Official UK Singles Chart has spoken! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean is currently number 1.

angles.name: New Music Monday
angles.copy: Start your week with the UK's top track! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are dominating the charts with 'Rein Me In'.

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 today, born July 20, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to get lost in?

angles.name: Timeless Talent
angles.copy: 79 years young today, Carlos Santana! Still bringing the smooth guitar vibes. Which album is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Cat Stevens' 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, will be 78 tomorrow, born July 21, 1948.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Cat Stevens turns 78! Which of his timeless songs resonates most with you?

angles.name: Yusuf Islam
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday for tomorrow to the incredible Yusuf / Cat Stevens! A true musical poet.

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and vocalist for The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22, 1947.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: The voice of so many Eagles classics, Don Henley turns 79 this Wednesday! What's your favourite Henley-led track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley! His music has shaped generations. What's your go-to Eagles song?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24, 1969.

angles.name: JLo Turns 57
angles.copy: Can you believe J.Lo turns 57 this Thursday? Still an absolute force in music, film, and fashion! What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez on Thursday! Get ready to dance to her biggest tracks all day long.

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday this Saturday. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incredible Mick Jagger on Saturday! An undeniable legend of rock and roll.

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30, 1958.

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: The inimitable Kate Bush turns 68 next week! Which of her groundbreaking tracks is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Wuthering Heights
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the unique talent that is Kate Bush next Thursday! Still running up that hill of musical genius.

moments.title: Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The UK summer school holidays are well underway, with many families enjoying breaks across the country and abroad.

angles.name: Holiday Fun
angles.copy: Summer holidays are in full swing! What exciting plans do you have for the rest of July?

angles.name: Staycation or Away
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer break! Are you on a staycation adventure or exploring somewhere new this year?
